text: Hello? Can I help you? Good afternoon, my name is Sophie. I'm reaching out because we're running a quick coverage gap audit for folks before the December 7 cutoff. It's about a four-minute look at what your current plan actually pays versus what you'd owe out of pocket in a real situation. A lot of people assume their plan covers more than it actually does, And the gap only shows up when...
